title: Industrial Mechanic (Hydraulic & Electrical)
description:
• Well Established Company

  • Salary $3500 - $5000 + OT + Variable Bonus

  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression

  • Working location: Tuas (Company Transport Provided)

  • Working Days: Monday to Friday

  • Working Hours: 8.30am to 5.30pm

Job Responsibilities:

  • Perform preventive and corrective maintenance on industrial electrical, hydraulic, and electro-hydraulic systems.

  • Troubleshoot and repair electrical panels, motors, sensors, control circuits, and production machinery.

  • Carry out hydraulic and electro-hydraulic maintenance including pumps, valves, actuators, cylinders, and pressurised systems.

  • Support fault diagnosis involving PLC-controlled equipment and coordinate with engineers or vendors for advanced issues.

  • Conduct routine inspections to ensure equipment reliability and operational safety.

  • Execute lock-out/tag-out (LOTO) procedures and comply with pressurised system safety requirements.

  • Maintain accurate maintenance records, breakdown reports, and follow-up action logs.

  • Respond to equipment breakdowns and support production continuity.

  • Comply strictly with Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) regulations and company safety procedures.

Job Requirements:

  • Possess minimum Diploma in Engineering (Electrical, Mechanical, Mechatronics, Industrial Maintenance, or related field).

  • Minimum 2–3 years of relevant experience in industrial or heavy manufacturing maintenance.

  • Experience in steel plants or similar heavy industrial environments is preferred.

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities

  • Current and Expected salary

  • Reason for leaving

  • Date of availability

  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

LIONG ZHAO GUAN (R22107632)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
